reviews.review_description:
We can enter the home area in Space Ball VR, but we cannot start matches because the match screen keeps loading and never starts.
Online play is currently impossible for us. We really hope this can be fixed.
Me and my bro used to play this now it won't load wondering how to fix this.
gorilla tag game x rocket league = echo vr killer
Super fun to play!
Bad community, Bad gameplay. No one online to play

The concept of this game is truly commendable, and it represents a promising direction for VR gaming. I firmly believe that more VR games should adopt this innovative approach to movement, making it a standout example with significant untapped potential.

More people need to be playing this game! The game mechanics are great, the graphics are good enough and it is a lot of fun. It's nice to see VR games being developed that are not just more mindless shooters.
It's cool that it tells you how many calories you burned whilst being fun
Love that it is fun and makes you fit

Space Ball VR is a phenomenal virtual reality game that completely immerses players in a zero-gravity environment. With the use of virtual reality controllers, players must skillfully hit a ball into a goal. The game is highly customizable with various arenas and difficulty levels to choose from. However, the graphics could be better, and the game may be too challenging for casual players. Despite these minor flaws, Space Ball VR is an incredibly fun and engaging game that is perfect for sci-fi and sports enthusiasts alike.
The themes and movement is amazing!

(1) When you hit the ball, 7 times out of 10 it will rather not go the direction you want, barely move, or shoot across the field no in between. The movement is very unpredictable and hard to maneuver. (2) Since there’s a small community at the moment, you have to play with bots most of the time and the bot teammates will hit the ball in you’re goal or just not do anything, basically it’s a 1v5 but on the other hand the opponent bots they’ll never make a mistake and if their near you’re goal they will score 90% of the time, even if you’re guarding the goal. (3) After you score a goal, it doesn’t reset the field it will just respawn in the middle and makes it almost impossible to defend you’re goal. This game has potential, it just has A LOT of problems and frustrating issues at the moment.

This game is great and very easy to learn. It is just like gorilla tag but way better. And love that it has rocket league in it too. And the graphics are great. I would recommend buying this game if you have a good taste of interest.
SPACE BALL IS TRASH WHEN U DASH YOU GO 1CM
Very fun, I could see this game getting a competitive league. Really good workout.
This game is amazing it has everything you would need And most of all you better get your chargers ready because you spend all your battery playing this game it is so fun and definitely a five star

This game is so well made there’s multiplayer and ai that you can play with and there is 2 game modes (as of the time I’m making this review). I highly recommend this game. And I hope that it will become popular in the future.
I threw up 🤮😭

blade ball maybe
idk lets find out
Loved the mechanics of the game, almost crashed a vase with flowers! But the whole idea of motion mechanics is brilliant! Would love to play more!
